name: 15q15_FBN1_proximal_SD
description: FBN1 (fibrillin-1, Marfan syndrome) at 15q21.1 sits adjacent to a 15q15-15q21 SD cluster harbouring DUOX1/DUOX2 dual oxidase paralogs and the FBN1 region flank. Small (5-30 kb at 93-98% identity) intra-chromosomal SDs flank FBN1 introns and mediate rare intragenic deletions reported in Marfan-spectrum probands.

architecture.internal_structure: DUOX1-DUOX2 ~80% identical paralog cluster proximal; 5-30 kb intronic SD pairs flanking FBN1 distal; Alu-mediated breakpoints add small deletions.
